_description: Tier 1 SKU — candidate_price equals competitor_lowest (tie) → HOLD, NOT push into tie (margin-sacrifice strictly worse)
_note: competitor_lowest=2001; floor=2000; target_undercut=2000; candidate=MAX(2000,2000)=2000; 2000 < 2001 → UNDERCUT BUT if we set up such that candidate === competitor_lowest: HOLD. Adjust prices so candidate==competitor_lowest. TODO (Amelia): tune so candidate_price === competitor_lowest to verify tie-handling
